title: TrueFrame
description: A lightweight modpack designed to get max FPS!
body:
Tired of lag and stuttering? TrueFrame is here to deliver the ultimate Minecraft experience with smooth, high-FPS gameplay!

Here's what awaits you:

Optimized Performance: Enjoy a seamless and responsive Minecraft experience with carefully selected mods that boost performance and reduce lag.

Seamless Gameplay: Say goodbye to frustrating lag spikes and enjoy a smooth and immersive gaming experience.

Good for potato PCs: Runs smoothly with low input lag and high FPS!
